executive_summary: Platform is in maintenance mode with zero call activity in the last 24 hours across all 7 verticals. All agent systems are healthy with proper backups and configurations intact. No revenue activity, no optimization work performed, and no customer engagement to report.

sections.title: Call Performance
sections.content:
**Zero activity across the board.**

- Total calls: **0**
- Bookings created: **0**
- Active clients: **0**
- Conversion rate: N/A

No call data to analyze. Platform appears to be in a quiet period or pre-launch phase.

sections.title: Agent Performance
sections.content:
**No optimization activity.**

All 7 optimizer agents (electrical, general-contractor, hvac, medspa, onboarding, plumbing, sales) are standing by with no reports generated. Without incoming calls, there's no data for agents to analyze or prompts to improve.

*Agents are ready to activate once call volume begins.*

sections.title: System Health
sections.content:
**All systems green.**

✅ All 7 verticals reporting healthy status
✅ Prompts and rules files intact
✅ Template variables preserved
✅ Backups current
✅ JSON validation passing

No broken files, no missing templates, no errors. Infrastructure is solid and ready for production load.

No billing events or customer communications in the last 24 hours.

sections.title: New Verticals
sections.content:
**No new verticals created this week.**

Current lineup remains stable at 7 verticals: electrical, general-contractor, hvac, medspa, onboarding, plumbing, and sales.

sections.title: Outlook
sections.content:
**Watch for launch signals.**

The platform is technically sound but dormant. Key indicators to monitor today:

- First client onboarding activity
- Initial call volume
- Email system activation
- Any vertical-specific testing

Once calls start flowing, optimizer agents will begin their daily improvement cycles automatically.

action_items: Confirm whether zero call volume is expected (pre-launch) or indicates a technical issue with call routing
Consider running test calls through each vertical to validate end-to-end functionality
Review client onboarding pipeline to understand when activity is expected to begin
